summary: Ceiling Mode directive and command are published, but the current MEDIASERVER command runner has not consumed foundry_ceiling_mode_autonomy and previously reports unsupported actions outside status.

blocker.name: Local command consumer cannot execute Foundry ceiling-mode commands
blocker.evidence: command_result.json last reports unsupported_action for script_snippets from ScarFLIXV2_CommandRunner. Expected Mission Control files were not created by local workers.
blocker.impact: GitHub/ChatGPT control path is active, but local execution is not yet running the full Mission Control Plane.
blocker.required_fix: Upgrade local command consumer to support foundry_ceiling_mode_autonomy and bootstrap Mission Control Plane without reducing scope.
